allow: PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser -Force; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri https://get.scoop.sh | Invoke-Expression)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\shims;$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\maven\\current\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\java project\\money-manager"; mvn clean compile -q 2>&1)
